attributes.description: Persistence + threat-hunting findings across registry and EVTX. Registry-side: Run keys, RunOnce, services, scheduled tasks, IFEO debugger hijacks, AppInit_DLLs, startup folder, plus the curated 'Threat Hunting' batch category. EVTX-side: service installs (7045), service status changes (7036), scheduled task created/modified/deleted/enabled (4697/4698/4699/4700/4701/4702). If something installed itself to outlive a reboot, it should appear here.

attributes.title: Insider Threat: Persistence & Autoruns (registry + EVTX)
